_comment_ignoreCommand: Skip Vercel builds for every branch EXCEPT main. This saves build minutes while we iterate on feature branches tested via `npm run dev` locally. Logic: exit 1 = build, exit 0 = skip. Vercel docs: https://vercel.com/docs/projects/overview#ignored-build-step
ignoreCommand: if [ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" = "main" ]; then exit 1; else exit 0; fi
